description: NexusIQ customer support ticket export, Q1 2025. One record per ticket. Fields: ticket_id, opened, status, priority, category, product, subject, summary, resolution.

tickets.subject: Tablet screen rotation broken out of the box
tickets.summary: Customer reports auto-rotate not working on a new tablet. Matches the accelerometer calibration defect documented in the September 2024 supplier corrective action.
tickets.resolution: Replaced under defective/DOA window. Unit serial logged against supplier corrective action CAPA-2024-091.

tickets.subject: Jeans two sizes smaller than labeled
tickets.summary: Size/fit complaint consistent with the FY 2024 pattern where fit issues drive 44% of clothing returns. Customer within the 60-day clothing window.
tickets.resolution: Exchange processed. Pointed customer to the sizing guide updated October 2024.

tickets.subject: Refund not received after 6 days
tickets.summary: Refund initiated but gateway settlement exceeded the 48-hour internal target. Root cause: holiday-volume backlog in the payments queue.
tickets.resolution: Refund confirmed on day 7. Goodwill store credit of $25 issued under the January backlog remediation memo.

tickets.subject: Gold member asked about receipt-free returns
tickets.summary: Customer at Gold tier wanted to confirm returns without a physical receipt. Confirmed account lookup is available at Gold tier and above.

tickets.subject: Laptop dead on arrival, fan spins then shuts down
tickets.summary: DOA claim within the 90-day defective window. Second DOA from the same distribution lot flagged by Risk Operations for pattern review.
tickets.resolution: Advance replacement shipped. Lot number escalated to vendor quality via Apex Electronics agreement clause 7.2.

tickets.subject: Bedding color does not match listing photos
tickets.summary: Not-as-described complaint. Listing photos for this SKU were updated in Q3 2024 but the cached marketplace listing still showed old images.
tickets.resolution: Full refund; marketplace cache purge requested. Listing team notified.

tickets.subject: Return pending 12 business days without update
tickets.summary: Return exceeded the 10-business-day pending threshold and auto-escalated to Tier 2 per the Customer Escalation Policy.
tickets.resolution: In Tier 2 queue; inspection backlog cited. Awaiting warehouse confirmation.

tickets.subject: Asking whether the 35-day window applies
tickets.summary: Platinum member purchased a phone on February 1 and asked about the return window. Policy v3 extends Electronics to 35 days for Gold and Platinum effective March 1, 2025; purchase predates v3 so the 30-day window applied.
tickets.resolution: Explained effective dates. Customer returned the phone on day 27, within window either way.

tickets.subject: Wrong item shipped: received resistance bands
tickets.summary: Pick error at the West regional warehouse. Wrong-item-shipped returns bypass the restocking fee by policy.
tickets.resolution: Correct item shipped with expedited carrier; return label issued at no cost.

tickets.subject: Flagged for too many returns, disputes fraud hold
tickets.summary: Account exceeded three returns in 90 days, triggering the automatic Risk Operations review defined in the returns policy. Customer disputed the temporary hold.
tickets.resolution: Manual review cleared the account; two of the returns were the documented tablet calibration defect and were excluded from the fraud counter.
